title: selaginella praetermissa
intro: Selaginella praetermissa, a species of spore-producing plant also known as a resprouter, is a type of evergreen, terrestrial plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Selaginella praetermissa include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. Selaginella praetermissa is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
